headline: Dutch Court Orders Knaken Crypto Platform Into Bankruptcy

article.title: Dutch court declares crypto platform Knaken bankrupt over missing funds
article.summary: The Rotterdam court said bankruptcy was necessary to ensure an orderly settlement because the company lacked enough assets to fully repay users.

headline: Nasdaq Futures Plummet 1.9% Amid Chip Sell-Off

article.title: Nasdaq Futures Tumble 1.9% as Chip Rout Deepens: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Nasdaq 100 futures tumbled 1.9% as the global selloff in chipmakers gathered pace, with traders rushing to exit positions in stocks that had fueled this year’s rally but whose valuations grew increasingly rich.

headline: HSBC Upgrades Apple to Buy on AI Catalyst

article.title: Apple Upgraded to Buy by HSBC on Agentic AI, Hardware Pipeline
article.summary: Apple Inc. was upgraded to buy at HSBC Holdings Plc on Friday, in the latest reflection of how Wall Street is increasingly positive on the iPhone maker’s position in a market where many trades related to artificial intelligence have been faltering.
